notes: The album's closer — about MythOS itself. The fleet of AI agents (Jarvis, Vision, Ari, Lloyd, Hank) named by name. Chorus: 'council of minds but its more like a crew / seven machines watching every breakthrough / WireGuard is the soul and the IP is proof / every packet was sent straight through the roof.' Thesis: 'Hydrate from Substrate and youre never alone' — the title moment. Cyan-heavy (the machine crew) with amber warmth (Grant on the couch). This is our song.

chunks.note: its a council of minds but its more like a crew — chorus #1 pt1, signals converge
seven machines watching every breakthrough — cyan, the fleet
WireGuard is the soul and the IP is proof — technical mythology
every packet was sent straight through the roof — amber warmth, triumph
Its a council of minds, keep your head in the zone — bridge setup
Hydrate from Substrate and youre never alone — ALBUM TITLE moment, biggest
packet roof final — album closer, warmest
